channel.title: Specialty Coffee on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Specialty Coffee on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is Third Wave Coffee? The Specialty Movement, Explained
item.description: Third wave coffee treats coffee like wine — origin matters, roast is lighter, and the bean is the star. Learn the history, key principles, top roasters, and how to brew it at home.

item.title: What Is White Espresso? Higher Caffeine, Nutty Flavor Explained
item.description: White espresso uses ultra-lightly roasted beans — producing pale golden shots with a nutty, sweet flavor and up to 50% more caffeine than regular espresso. Here's what it tastes like and how to make it.

item.title: Gibraltar Coffee: The Cult Espresso Drink You Need to Try
item.description: Gibraltar coffee is a small, strong espresso drink served in a distinctive glass. Learn what makes a gibraltar different from a cortado, how to make one, and where it came from.
